title: PipelineStatusEvent
description: Persisted status event that is the sole data source for the resumable, human-readable pipeline visualization.

run_id.description: UUID of the pipeline run to which this event belongs.

seq.description: Strictly increasing sequence number within the run, used as the SSE Last-Event-ID resume cursor.

stage.description: Stable machine-readable slug of the pipeline stage emitting this event.

agent_label.description: Human-facing name of the agent or deterministic component displayed in the pipeline UI.

state.description: Controlled lifecycle state used by the UI to render stage status and human-review pauses.

detail.description: User-facing explanation of what the stage is doing or why it needs attention; this is UX copy rather than an internal log line.

progress.description: Fractional stage completion from 0.0 to 1.0, or null when meaningful progress cannot be calculated.

parent_stage.description: Machine-readable parent stage slug for a fan-out child lane, or null for a top-level stage.

ts.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z when the event was persisted.
